jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Adda247
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
